description: DEFERRED (not v1). NARROW coordination `.compose/roadmap.json` — workspaces[], sharedMilestones[], integrationItems[] only. Augmentation that no feature.json owns; never repeats per-feature data and is NOT a second tracker (Codex round-1/2: don't put themes/GTM/program-tracking/incubation here — ideation stays in the ideabox, and narrative prose is preserved via COMP-ROADMAP-MIGRATE's preserved-sections/docs, not relocated into roadmap.json). Not a prerequisite for MIGRATE (option C needs no roadmap.json). Build only once a real coordination consumer exists. Anchor: docs/plans/2026-06-21-roadmap-planning-model-design.md.
